1.description: retrieve Finnmark county geometry by fylkesnummer to avoid name mismatch

2.description: retrieve all municipalities within Finnmark county using spatial join

3.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones for all municipalities in Finnmark

4.description: retrieve all buildings within Finnmark municipalities

5.description: join buildings to 200-year flood zones to identify buildings in flood zones

6.description: count buildings in flood zones per municipality

7.description: sort municipalities by building count descending
